ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rf_modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the RF module */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the RF module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the RF module */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the RF module */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was produced */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the module */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the module (e.g., prototype, production, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rf_output_power" (
  "output_power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF output power entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF module */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to identify the output power metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output power metric */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the output power is measured */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the output power */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the output power */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the output power */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the output power */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the output power was measured */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_output_power_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES rf_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_output_power_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES rf_modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rf_output_power_stability" (
  "stability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF output power stability entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF module */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to identify the output power stability metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output power stability metric */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the output power stability is measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the output power stability */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the output power stability */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the stability was measured */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_output_power_stability_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES rf_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_output_power_stability_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES rf_modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmitter_phase_noise" (
  "phase_noise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmitter phase noise entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF module */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to identify the phase noise metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase noise metric */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the phase noise is measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the phase noise */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the phase noise */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the phase noise was measured */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_noise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmitter_phase_noise_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES rf_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmitter_phase_noise_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES rf_modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rf_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "voltage_min" REAL /* Minimum voltage level for the condition */,
  "voltage_max" REAL /* Maximum voltage level for the condition */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Frequency band for the condition */,
  "temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the condition */,
  "temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the condition */,
  "humidity_min" REAL /* Minimum humidity for the condition */,
  "humidity_max" REAL /* Maximum humidity for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rf_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RF measurement */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF module */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to identify the measured metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measured metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the measurement was taken */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., lab, field, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_measurements_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES rf_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rf_measurements_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES rf_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RF module being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the module */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the module was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, test) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES rf_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
